mapper.select: SELECT a.`order_quantity` AS `orderQuantity` , a.`product_id` AS `productId` , b.`code` AS `productCode` , b.`name` AS `productName` , b.`purchase_price` AS `productPurchasePrice` , b.`sale_price` AS `productSalePrice` , b.`purchase_unit` AS `productPurchaseUnit` , b.`unit` AS `productUnit` , b.`spec` AS `productSpec` , c.`name` AS `productAttributeName` , d.`name` AS `productGroupName` , e.`name` AS `productTypeName` FROM `franchise_product_order_stat` a LEFT JOIN `product` b ON a.`product_id` = b.id LEFT JOIN `product_attribute` c ON b.`product_attribute_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_group` d ON b.`product_group_id` = d.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_type` e ON b.`product_type_id` = e.`id` WHERE `franchise_id` = #{franchiseId} AND `year` = #{year} AND `month` = #{month}
